summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a stellar show featuring Wharf Rat, Begonias, Fire and an incredible Other One with Brent Mydland’s debut shining through.
review: All four reviewers rave about the crystal‑clear board recording, calling it “incredible” and praising the performance of Brent Mydland. Standout moments include a powerful Wharf Rat, a favorite Begonia‑Fire pairing and an “incredible” The Other One, indicating both superb musical execution and top‑notch sound quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high star ratings (4–5) and uniformly enthusiastic comments about both the performance and the board quality place this recording near the top of the scale.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the audio as “incredible,” “always amazed by these soundboards,” and note no flaws—indicating a crisp, clear mix with excellent balance.

show_quality.setlist_flow: While not detailed, reviewers highlight multiple high points across the set, suggesting a consistently strong and engaging performance.

band_member_comments.Keys: Brent Mydland’s keyboard work is repeatedly praised – reviewers call his debut a “good test” he passed and say he adds so much to the show.
